bead.title: FEAT-008 P0: shell routes + a11y tokens + theme
bead.description: Ensure a11y.spec.ts 13/13 green by creating: (1) root aliases /beads /documents /graph /agent /personas that redirect to node/project-scoped route, (2) verify /nodes/[nodeId]/+page.svelte renders <h1> (add if missing), (3) centralize status/priority/tier color tokens in src/app.css for .light + .dark roots. Do NOT rename existing toggle aria-label='Toggle dark mode' (already matches test regex). Defer screenshot baselines until per-feature phases.
bead.acceptance: e2e/a11y.spec.ts green; root /agent exists (redirect or shell with h1); no hard-coded hex added in this phase.
